## Freelance Service Agreement

### Preamble

This Freelance Service Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of January 15, 2025 ("Effective Date"), by and between Sarah Johnson, Marketing Director of TechStartup Inc. ("Client"), and Alex Chen, Senior Designer of Chen Creative Studio ("Freelancer").

### Recitals

WHEREAS, Client desires to engage Freelancer for the Brand Refresh 2025 project involving a complete visual identity redesign; WHEREAS, Freelancer has the expertise and agrees to provide such services upon the terms and conditions set forth herein.

---

## Clauses (10 total)

### Scope of Work

*Type: standard*

Freelancer agrees to perform the services described in Exhibit A ('Scope of Work') attached hereto, which includes: 1.1 Visual identity redesign including logo, color palette, typography, and brand guidelines document ('Project').

### Deliverables and Timeline

*Type: standard*

Freelancer shall deliver the following: 2.1 Logo concepts (3 options) due January 30, 2025. 2.2 Selected logo refinement due February 15, 2025. 2.3 Brand guidelines document due March 1, 2025. 2.4 Asset package delivery due March 15, 2025.

### Compensation and Payment

*Type: standard*

3.1 Total Payment: Client agrees to pay Freelancer $8,500 for completion of the Project. 3.2 Deposit: A non-refundable deposit of $2,550 shall be paid upon execution of this Agreement. 3.3 Payment Schedule: Payments are to be made upon completion of each milestone as follows: - $2,000 upon delivery of logo concepts, - $1,500 upon selected logo refinement, - $2,500 upon delivery of brand guidelines, - $2,500 upon asset package delivery.

### Revisions

*Type: standard*

Freelancer agrees to provide up to three (3) rounds of revisions per deliverable. Additional revisions will be billed at an hourly rate agreed upon by both parties prior to commencement.

### Intellectual Property Assignment

*Type: standard*

Upon full payment, Freelancer assigns to Client all rights, title, and interest in and to the final deliverables, excluding any third-party materials and underlying tools, subject to the terms of this Agreement.

### Confidentiality

*Type: standard*

Each party agrees not to disclose any confidential information received from the other party to any third parties, except as necessary to perform the services outlined in this Agreement.

### Cancellation and Termination

*Type: standard*

Either party may terminate this Agreement upon written notice if the other party breaches a material term of this Agreement and fails to cure such breach within ten (10) days after receipt of written notice.

### Limitation of Liability

*Type: standard*

In no event shall either party be liable to the other for any indirect, special, incidental, or consequential damages arising out of or in connection with this Agreement.

### Governing Law

*Type: standard*

This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of California, without regard to its conflict of law principles. Any legal proceedings arising out of this Agreement shall be brought in the courts of the County of [Insert County], California.

### General Provisions

*Type: standard*

10.1 Entire Agreement: This Agreement, together with any exhibits or schedules, constitutes the entire agreement between the parties. 10.2 Amendments: Any amendments must be in writing and signed by both parties. 10.3 Waiver: No waiver of any breach of any provision of this Agreement shall constitute a waiver of any prior, concurrent, or subsequent breach of the same or any other provisions hereof.
